# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Create a CloudFormation template for our complete application stack (VPC, EC2, RDS, S3, Load Balancer). Focus on core infrastructure components. We'll add CloudWatch alarms and detailed monitoring after we deploy and verify the basic setup works.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: CloudFormation template for complete application stack

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: MyVPC

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties: {}

  AttachGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  Subnet:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [ 0, !GetAZs 'us-east-1' ]
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: MySubnet

  SecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Enable SSH and HTTP access
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 22
          ToPort: 22
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 80
          ToPort: 80
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0

  EC2Instance:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      InstanceType: t2.micro
      ImageId: ami-0c55b159cbfafe01e # Choose appropriate AMI
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref SecurityGroup
      SubnetId: !Ref Subnet

  DBInstance:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBInstance
    Properties:
      DBInstanceClass: db.t2.micro
      AllocatedStorage: 20
      Engine: mysql
      DBInstanceIdentifier: mydatabase
      MasterUsername: admin
      MasterUserPassword: Password1234
      VPCSecurityGroups:
        - !Ref SecurityGroup

  S3Bucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: my-application-bucket

  LoadBalancer:
    Type: AWS::ElasticLoadBalancing::LoadBalancer
    Properties:
      LoadBalancerName: MyLoadBalancer
      Listeners:
        - LoadBalancerPort: 80
          InstancePort: 80
          Protocol: HTTP
      Subnets:
        - !Ref Subnet
      SecurityGroups:
        - !Ref SecurityGroup

Outputs:
  VPCId:
    Description: "VPC Id"
    Value: !Ref VPC
  EC2InstanceId:
    Description: "EC2 Instance Id"
    Value: !Ref EC2Instance
  DBEndpoint:
    Description: "Database Endpoint"
    Value: !GetAtt DBInstance.Endpoint.Address
  S3BucketName:
    Description: "S3 Bucket Name"
    Value: !Ref S3Bucket
  LoadBalancerDNS:
    Description: "DNS Name of Load Balancer"
    Value: !GetAtt LoadBalancer.DNSName
